b000.name: Blue Team
b000.short: Keep the President away from the Bomber
b000.ability: You are on the Blue Team. You win if the President does not gain the dead condition.

r000.name: Red Team
r000.short: Get the Bomber with the President
r000.ability: You are on the Red Team. You win if the President gains the dead condition.

b001.name: President
b001.ability: You are a primary character. Blue Team wins if you do not gain the dead condition at the end of the game.

r001.name: Bomber
r001.ability: You are a primary character. Everyone in your room at game end gains the dead condition. Red wins if the President is dead.

g008.name: Gambler
g008.ability: After the last hostage exchange, pause and announce which team you think will win (Red, Blue, or neither). You win if correct.

b014.name: Doctor
b014.ability: Blue has an extra win condition: the President must card share with the Doctor before the end of the game, or Blue loses.

r014.name: Engineer
r014.ability: Red has an extra win condition: the Bomber must card share with the Engineer before the end of the game, or Red loses.

b015.name: Tuesday Knight
b015.short: Card share with Bomber → instant win
b015.ability: If you card share with the Bomber, the game ends immediately and Blue Team wins.

r015.name: Dr. Boom
r015.short: Card share with President → instant win
r015.ability: If you card share with the President, the game ends immediately and Red Team wins.

b024.name: Nurse
b024.ability: Backup for the Doctor. If the Doctor is buried or dead, you carry out the Doctor’s card-share responsibility with the President.

r024.name: Tinkerer
r024.ability: Backup for the Engineer. If the Engineer is buried or dead, you carry out the Engineer’s card-share responsibility with the Bomber.

b002.name: Agent
b002.ability: Once per round, privately reveal to a player and force them to card share with you.

r002.name: Agent
r002.ability: Once per round, privately reveal to a player and force them to card share with you.

b018.name: President’s Daughter
b018.ability: If the President is buried or dead, you become the target: Red wins if you gain the dead condition.

r018.name: Martyr
r018.ability: If the Bomber is buried or dead, you boom instead: everyone in your room gains the dead condition at game end.

b009.name: Coy Boy
b009.ability: You cannot card share, privately reveal, or publicly reveal (except Psychologist exceptions). Color share only when allowed by rules.

r009.name: Coy Boy
r009.ability: You cannot card share, privately reveal, or publicly reveal (except Psychologist exceptions). Color share only when allowed by rules.

b023.name: Negotiator
b023.ability: You can initiate card shares. In rooms with Negotiators, sharing rules follow the Negotiator / savvy conditions.

r023.name: Negotiator
r023.ability: You can initiate card shares. In rooms with Negotiators, sharing rules follow the Negotiator / savvy conditions.

b004.name: Angel
b004.ability: You begin with the honest condition: you must always verbally tell the truth.

r004.name: Angel
r004.ability: You begin with the honest condition: you must always verbally tell the truth.

b013.name: Liar
b013.ability: You begin with the liar condition: you must always verbally lie.

r013.name: Liar
r013.ability: You begin with the liar condition: you must always verbally lie.

b007.name: Clown
b007.ability: You must smile for the entire game. No frowning.

r007.name: Clown
r007.ability: You must smile for the entire game. No frowning.

b021.name: Mime
b021.ability: You may not speak for the entire game. Gestures only.

r021.name: Mime
r021.ability: You may not speak for the entire game. Gestures only.

b025.name: Paparazzo
b025.ability: You ignore the Privacy Promise variant: you may look at private shares when able.

r025.name: Paparazzo
r025.ability: You ignore the Privacy Promise variant: you may look at private shares when able.

b030.name: Red Spy
b030.ability: You are on the Red Team, but your card is blue (looks Blue). Best with 11+ players (color sharing).

r030.name: Blue Spy
r030.ability: You are on the Blue Team, but your card is red (looks Red). Best with 11+ players (color sharing).

g001.name: Agoraphobe
g001.ability: You win if you never leave your starting room.

g002.name: Ahab
g002.ability: You win if Moby gains the dead condition and you do not. Play with Moby.

g017.name: Moby
g017.ability: You win if you avoid the Bomber and Ahab as described on your card. Play with Ahab.

g007.name: Decoy
g007.ability: You win if the Sniper shoots you. Play with Sniper / Target.

g009.name: Hot Potato
g009.ability: You lose by default, but when someone card shares with you, you swap cards with them.

g010.name: Intern
g010.ability: You win if you are in the same room as the President at the end of the game.

g014.name: MI6
g014.ability: You win if you card share with both the President and the Bomber before the end of the game.

g019.name: Private Eye
g019.ability: When playing with a buried card, guess what was buried. You win if correct.

g021.name: Rival
g021.ability: You win if you are not in the same room as the President at the end of the game.

g024.name: Sniper
g024.ability: At game end, shoot a player. You win if you shoot the Target. Play with Target / Decoy.

g028.name: Survivor
g028.ability: You win if you do not gain the dead condition at the end of the game.

g025.name: Victim
g025.ability: You win if you gain the dead condition at the end of the game.

g029.name: Wife
g029.ability: Grey win tied to Ahab / Moby / Mistress setups. Check the character guide for the full objective.

g016.name: Mistress
g016.ability: Grey win tied to Ahab / Moby / Wife setups. Check the character guide for the full objective.

PLAYSETS.name: Classic Kaboom
PLAYSETS.blurb: Kaboom rules: President, Bomber, team cards, Gambler on odd counts, and player-scaled rounds.

PLAYSETS.name: My first game
PLAYSETS.blurb: President, Bomber, team cards only. Best for teaching.

PLAYSETS.name: First color share
PLAYSETS.blurb: Doctor & Engineer, classic first advanced game.

PLAYSETS.name: Classic + Spy
PLAYSETS.blurb: President, Bomber, team cards, and a Spy per team whose card color doesn't match their true team.

PLAYSETS.name: Instant Death
PLAYSETS.blurb: Doctor, Engineer, Tuesday Knight, Dr. Boom; games can end early.

PLAYSETS.name: 6 Player Mystery
PLAYSETS.blurb: Daughter, Martyr, Private Eye; bury one card.

PLAYSETS.name: Custom mix
PLAYSETS.blurb: Pick the exact cards in the deck. The cards you pick are the rules.

PACKS.name: Agents
PACKS.blurb: Force a card share once per round.

PACKS.name: Spies
PACKS.blurb: Card color is the opposite of your true team.

LEADERS.name: Leader, Room A
LEADERS.ability: Hold this while you are leader. Choose hostages at round end. Leaders cannot be hostages.

LEADERS.name: Leader, Room B
LEADERS.ability: Hold this while you are leader. Choose hostages at round end. Leaders cannot be hostages.
